panel-upgrades.title: Panel Upgrades
panel-upgrades.intro: Upgrade outdated electrical panels so your property can safely support modern appliances, renovations, EV chargers, and everyday power demand.

sections.heading: When to upgrade
sections.body: Federal Pacific, Zinsco, or fuse panels, frequent breaker trips, and planned additions are common triggers for a service upgrade.

sections.heading: What we deliver
sections.body: Load calculations, permit coordination, neat panel installation, labeling, and final inspection support.

sections.heading: Capacity planning
sections.body: We size your service for today's circuits and tomorrow's EV, heat pump, or workshop demands.

lighting-installation.title: Lighting Installation
lighting-installation.intro: Interior, exterior, recessed, security, and feature lighting with clean wiring and a finished look that fits your space.

sections.heading: Interior lighting
sections.body: Recessed cans, pendants, under-cabinet, and dimmer-compatible circuits installed to code.

sections.heading: Exterior & landscape
sections.body: Wall sconces, pathway, and security lighting with weather-rated fixtures and proper GFCI protection.

sections.heading: Smart controls
sections.body: Compatible dimmers, timers, and smart switch integration where requested.

ev-chargers.title: EV Chargers
ev-chargers.intro: Dedicated circuits and charger-ready infrastructure for home garages and commercial parking.

sections.heading: Load assessment
sections.body: We verify panel capacity and recommend the right charger level for your vehicle and usage.

sections.heading: Installation
sections.body: Conduit, dedicated breaker, and charger mount with clean cable routing.

sections.heading: Future-ready
sections.body: Pathways planned for additional chargers or load management as your needs grow.

backup-generators.title: Backup Generators
backup-generators.intro: Transfer switches and generator integration for resilient backup power during outages.

sections.heading: Sizing
sections.body: Match generator output to essential circuits — heat, refrigeration, sump, and selected outlets.

sections.heading: Transfer switch
sections.body: Manual or automatic transfer with clear labeling and safe isolation from the grid.

sections.heading: Maintenance
sections.body: Testing protocols and access for annual service.

residential-electrical.title: Residential Electrical
residential-electrical.intro: Full-home wiring, renovations, additions, and electrical improvements for homeowners.

sections.heading: Renovations
sections.body: Kitchen, basement, and addition wiring coordinated with your general contractor.

sections.heading: Repairs
sections.body: Outlet, switch, and fixture repairs with root-cause diagnosis.

sections.heading: Inspections
sections.body: Pre-purchase and insurance inspections with clear reporting.

commercial-electrical.title: Commercial Electrical
commercial-electrical.intro: Tenant fit-outs, maintenance, and power distribution for offices, retail, and light industrial.

sections.heading: Fit-outs
sections.body: Power, lighting, and data pathways for new tenants and renovations.

sections.heading: Maintenance
sections.body: Scheduled service and emergency response for commercial properties.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: Code-compliant work with documentation for property managers.

rewiring.title: Rewiring
rewiring.intro: Replace outdated or unsafe wiring with modern copper systems built for capacity and safety.

sections.heading: Assessment
sections.body: Knob-and-tube, aluminum, or damaged wiring identified and scoped.

sections.heading: Phased approach
sections.body: Room-by-room or whole-home strategies to minimize disruption.

sections.heading: Final certification
sections.body: ESA inspection and documentation for insurance and resale.

surge-protection.title: Surge Protection
surge-protection.intro: Whole-home and point-of-use protection for sensitive electronics and appliances.

sections.heading: Whole-home
sections.body: Type 1 or Type 2 surge protectors at the service panel.

sections.heading: Point-of-use
sections.body: Dedicated protection for home offices, entertainment, and HVAC controls.

sections.heading: Layered defense
sections.body: Combined strategies for maximum equipment protection.
